tiers.name: Starter
tiers.description: For individuals and light finance workflows
features: Excel Conversion: up to 500 rows per request
Time Series: up to 1 year range, up to 3 currencies per request
Statistics: same limits as time series
Scheduler: up to 2 active schedules, up to 3 currencies per schedule

tiers.name: Growth
tiers.description: For growing teams and production usage
features: Excel Conversion: up to 2,000 rows per request
Time Series: up to 3 year range, up to 10 currencies per request
Statistics: same limits as time series
Scheduler: up to 5 active schedules, up to 10 currencies per schedule
Early access to latest published rates

tiers.name: Professional
tiers.description: For high-volume workloads and advanced automation
features: Excel Conversion: up to 20,000 rows per request
Time Series: up to 5 year range, up to 20 currencies per request
Statistics: same limits as time series
Scheduler: up to 10 active schedules, up to 20 currencies per schedule
Early access to latest published rates

comparison.label: REST API Access
comparison.description: Access exchange rates programmatically via REST APIs for integration into your applications.

comparison.label: Dashboard Access
comparison.description: Use the web dashboard to upload files, run conversions, and download results.

comparison.label: Requests / month
comparison.description: Total number of API requests allowed per month across all endpoints.

comparison.label: Data points / month
comparison.description: Total number of currency data points processed. 1 data point = 1 currency per trading day

comparison.label: Currencies per request
comparison.description: Number of target currencies you can convert to in a single request.

comparison.label: Excel Conversion
comparison.description: Maximum number of rows supported per file upload for currency conversion.

comparison.label: Time Series Range
comparison.description: Maximum historical date range allowed per request.

comparison.label: Active Schedules
comparison.description: Number of automated scheduled jobs you can run (daily, weekly, monthly exports).

comparison.label: Central bank(s) rate delivery
comparison.description: Get the full exchange rate dataset delivered directly as soon as central banks publish it.

comparison.label: Secure HTTPS Access
comparison.description: All data is transmitted securely over encrypted HTTPS connections.

comparison.label: Data Privacy
comparison.description: We don’t transmit or store your financial data — only amount values are processed and updated securely.
